column9: Tier-2 entry-level new grad program. Excellent comp ($137.5K base + bonus + RSU), structured EDP mentorship. Full-stack fit across Java/Python/TypeScript/React stack. Location lock (Pleasanton, CA, 4 days on-site for 2 years). Not AI/ML-focused; prioritize behind tier-1 AI/ML roles (Nuro, TEL, Outtake, Unity ML). Apply if tier-1 roles stall.
